# Feature request

Thanks for proposing a feature. Please describe the problem you are trying to
solve before the proposed solution; the maintainers may suggest an existing
alternative.

## Problem statement

What is the problem or limitation you are running into? Who else is affected?

## Proposed solution

What behaviour would you like to see? What does the user-facing flow look like?

## Alternatives considered

What other tools or workflows have you tried? What about the current
PatchCleaner Revisited behaviour is insufficient?

## Scope

- [ ] This can be implemented entirely in `patchCleanerRevisited.ps1`
- [ ] This requires changes to the documentation only
- [ ] This requires a new helper script
- [ ] This affects the WPF UI
- [ ] This affects the Leftovers Scanner only
- [ ] This affects the .NET cleanup workflow only

## Risk and safety

Is this feature potentially destructive? What new safeguards (confirmations,
restore points, dry-run mode) would be needed?

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a Pull Request for this feature
- [ ] I can help test the implementation
- [ ] I would prefer the maintainers to implement it
